emails.subject: illin'
emails.body: illin' Hi hon- sorry to have tossed and turned last nite i woke up with a cold! ugh I won't think about it and hope it clears up love you kq

emails.subject: RE: illin'
emails.body: RE: illin' richard and carrie cancelled the b-day party due to the baby being sick called about the lawn and left a msg told him we would leave a check for $25 on the back patio i slept just fine hope you feel better dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: illin'
emails.body: thanks for calling the lawn guy I ordered flowers from River Oaks Plant House the ones with lemons in bottom to send to Amy and Baby Mackenzie. I'm sure she'll love them. kq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: illin'
emails.body: that sounds good on the flowers mo is having her going away thing after work so i will be home later after that ok dq To: Quigley, Dutch
